Identification.LongTitle: An Act to amend the Navigation Protection Act (Burnaby Lake, Deer Lake and Brunette River)
Identification.RunningHead: Navigation Protection (Burnaby Lake, Deer Lake and Brunette River)

Provision.Text: This enactment amends the Navigation Protection Act in order to add Burnaby Lake, Deer Lake and the Brunette River to the navigable waters listed in the schedule to that Act.
Her Majesty, by and with the advice and consent of the Senate and House of Commons of Canada, enacts as follows:

Section.Text: This Act may be cited as the Protecting Burnaby Lakes and Rivers Act.
Part 1 of the schedule to the Navigation Protection Act is amended by adding after item 4 in the columns shown the following:

Provision.Text: Column 1: 芒聙聹Deer Lake芒聙聺
Column 2: 芒聙聹49脗掳14芒聙虏10芒聙鲁 N, 122脗掳58芒聙虏19芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 3: 芒聙聹The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways芒聙聺
Column 1: 芒聙聹Burnaby Lake芒聙聺
Column 2: 芒聙聹49脗掳14芒聙虏36芒聙鲁 N, 122脗掳56芒聙虏39芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 3: 芒聙聹The lake芒聙聶s water boundary includes the mouths of all connecting waterways芒聙聺

Section.Text: Part 2 of the schedule to the Act is amended by adding after item 4 in the columns shown the following:

Provision.Text: Column 1: 芒聙聹Brunette River芒聙聺
Column 2: 芒聙聹49脗掳13芒聙虏11芒聙鲁 N, 122脗掳53芒聙虏31芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 3: 芒聙聹49脗掳14芒聙虏43芒聙鲁 N, 122脗掳55芒聙虏32芒聙鲁 W芒聙聺
Column 4: 芒聙聹From Burnaby Lake to the Fraser River芒聙聺
